title: saxifraga moschata subsp. fastigiata
intro: Saxifraga moschata subsp. fastigiata, also known as the sweet saxifrage, is a plant species belonging to the saxifrage family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Saxifraga moschata subsp. fastigiata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even help with respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used topically to treat various health concerns.
